rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §29.916, which governs home-schooled student access to PSAT/NMSQT and AP testing. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A school district shall permit a home-schooled student entitled under Section 25.001 to attend public school in the district to participate in an administration of the PSAT/NMSQT or a college advanced placement test offered by the district.
_note: No conflict. Educ. Code §29.916 addresses home-schooled student testing access; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption amounts. No statutory intersection.
